subparts.text: Define computer vision and list any two of its real-world applications. 2.5

What are dataset biases in computer vision? How do they affect model performance? 2.5

questions.question_text: Explain the data-driven approach in computer vision alongwith mathematical for mutation. Briefly describe how stochastic gradient descent works in optimizing a loss function. 10
